---
title: "Castelan Lab"
---

# Hugo G. Castelán-Sánchez

Postdoctoral Associate  
Western University, Canada  

Computational Virology • Microbial Genomics • Bioinformatics  

Email: hcastelans@gmail.com  

[GitHub](https://github.com/hugocastelan)  
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.es/citations?user=HlIT1ekAAAAJ)

---

# About

I am a computational biologist specializing in viral evolution, metagenomics and microbial ecology.

My research focuses on the evolutionary dynamics of viruses and microbial communities using genomics, phylogenetics and bioinformatics.
